title: Iran seizes 2 ships in Strait of Hormuz after Trump extends ceasefire (MSC-Francesca, Epaminondas)
snippet: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps said its naval forces seized two cargo vessels in the Strait of Hormuz — the Panama-flagged MSC-Francesca and the Liberia-flagged Epaminondas — and redirected them to the Iranian coast. The IRGC accused the crews of 'operating without necessary authorization' and 'manipulating their navigation systems'. The IRGC alleged MSC-Francesca was linked to Israel. A third vessel was also fired upon. UKMTO confirmed Iranian gunboat attacks off Oman coast.
tag_reason: 이전 7일 소스에 동일/유사 항목 없음. IRGC 선박 나포는 금일 발생한 신규 사건.
